backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing user profile storage with access control plus DCF input validation and valuation helper functions.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature IDs to affected frontend files and components with confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing the purpose of various frontend files in the project.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base and component styling with OKLCH color variables for light and dark themes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point defining metadata, favicon, root container, and script loader.
frontend/scripts/check-required-generate: Node prebuild script verifying required generated image assets exist in the public directory.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app wiring inputs, validation, actions, hero section, and results display for the DCF tool.
frontend/src/components/CalculatorAction: UI component providing example, reset, shareable link, and dev check action buttons with toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/DcfInputsForm.ts: React form component collecting DCF input fields and updating state with validation errors.
frontend/src/components/FormulasDialog.t: Dialog that lists all computed formulas grouped by category using formatted cards.
frontend/src/components/ResultsSection.t: Displays intrinsic and actual value calculations with animations and a combined calculate button.
frontend/src/features/dcf/calculations.t: Wraps formula registry to compute hidden values, intrinsic price, and actual value per share.
frontend/src/features/dcf/devChecks.ts: Runs verification checks comparing calculated intrinsic and actual values against expected values.
frontend/src/features/dcf/formulas.ts: Defines all DCF formulas, safe math helpers, and computes a full registry of formula outputs.
frontend/src/features/dcf/presets.ts: Defines DCF input interface and provides default, example, and verification input presets.
frontend/src/features/dcf/validation.ts: Validates DCF input fields for numeric bounds and formats, returning an array of field-specific errors.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to Internet Identity, refetching dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCountUp.ts: React hook that animates numbers from a start to end value using a smooth easing function.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity auth context, handling login state, stored identities, and AuthClient configuration.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Maps frontend DCF inputs to backend format and queries the backend to run DCF calculations.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueryInputs.ts: Manages DCF calculator inputs synced with URL parameters and generates shareable links.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind-based global styles defining light/dark theme variables and base typography.
frontend/src/lib/format.ts: Utility functions for formatting currency, large numbers, percentages, and general numeric output.
frontend/src/lib/number.ts: Parses numeric and percentage inputs safely and converts decimals to percent strings.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utilities for reading, storing, and clearing URL and session parameters, including hash-based routing support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with custom colors, font settings, container options, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Stores project metadata including schema versions, existing features, pending requests, and project configuration details.
